abilities.description: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a land card. CARDNAME deals damage equal to the number of nonland cards revealed this way to any target. If the revealed land card was a Mountain, CARDNAME deals double that damage instead. Put the revealed cards on the bottom of your library in any order.

effect.description: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a land card. CARDNAME deals damage equal to the number of nonland cards revealed this way to any target. If the revealed land card was a Mountain, CARDNAME deals double that damage instead. Put the revealed cards on the bottom of your library in any order.
effect.name: DigUntil
